data.content:
建立实施	企业
质量保证体系
企业应当建立并实施质量保证体系。

控制放行,确保符合	药品
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保药品未经质量控制部门放行不得发运或使用。<SEP>质量保证体系确保药品的设计与开发符合GMP要求。

确保明确	生产工艺
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保生产和控制活动有明确规定。

包括组成	组织机构
质量控制
质量控制包括相应的组织机构。

确保明确	管理职责
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保管理职责被明确规定。

包括组成	文件系统
质量控制
质量控制包括相应的文件系统。

确保检测	原材料
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保安排了原材料的检测。

包括活动	取样检验
质量控制
质量控制包括取样、检验等活动。

确保检测	中间产品
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保安排了中间产品的检测。

配备资源	人员
企业
企业应当配备足够的具有相应资质的人员。

确保检测	成品
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保安排了成品的检测。

确保检验	物料
质量控制
质量控制确保物料在放行前完成必要的检验。

确保提供	资源
高层管理人员
高层管理人员应当确保实现质量目标所必需的资源。

配备资源	企业
厂房设施设备
企业应当配备足够的厂房、设施和设备。

参与活动	质量活动
质量管理部门
质量管理部门应当参与所有与质量有关的活动。

经过验证	生产工艺
验证
生产工艺及其重大变更均经过验证。

确保完成	生产步骤
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保按照要求完成了生产过程中各步骤。

确保检验	产品
质量控制
质量控制确保产品在放行前完成必要的检验。

经过培训	培训
操作人员
操作人员经过培训以确保正确执行生产操作。

制定创建	企业
生产工艺
企业应当制定生产工艺。

确保可追溯	记录
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保每批药品的生产和质量控制记录可追溯。

经过调查	偏差
调查
偏差均经过调查。

使用包含	中文说明书
企业
企业应当使用清晰准确的中文说明书。

处理管理	偏差
偏差处理程序
偏差处理程序用于记录、说明和调查偏差。

拥有记录	企业
记录
生产全过程有手工或仪器的记录。

调查处理	偏差处理程序
重大偏差
偏差处理程序对重大偏差进行调查。

能够追溯	企业
批产品
企业能够追溯批产品的完整生产历史。

评估管理	变更
变更控制系统
变更控制系统对可能影响产品质量的变更进行评估和管理。

降低风险	产品发运
企业
产品的发运能够最大限度地降低质量风险。

经过评估	变更
评估批准
变更实施前应当经过评估、批准。

建立系统	企业
召回系统
企业应当建立召回系统，能够召回任何一批已发运的产品。

进行评价	变更
评价
变更实施后应当进行评价，确认变更达到了预期目标。

审查调查	企业
投诉
企业应当审查上市产品的投诉，调查原因并采取措施。

data.src_id: 供应商评估和批准程序
data.content:
确保采购	供应商评估和批准程序
原材料
供应商评估和批准程序确保原材料从认可的供应商处采购。

建立程序	企业
偏差处理程序
企业应当建立偏差处理程序。

建立系统	企业
变更控制系统
企业应当建立变更控制系统。

监控实施	GMP实施
自检
自检用于监控GMP的实施情况。

建立系统	CAPA系统
企业
企业应当建立CAPA系统。

法规要求	中国GMP(2010年修订版)
质量保证体系
中国GMP(2010年修订版)规定企业应当建立并实施质量保证体系。

提出措施	纠正预防措施
自检
自检提出必要的纠正和预防措施。

data.tgt_id: 供应商评估和批准程序
data.content:
建立程序	企业
供应商评估和批准程序
企业应当建立供应商评估和批准程序。

法规要求	中国GMP(2010年修订版)
质量控制
中国GMP(2010年修订版)规定了质量控制的组织机构、文件系统及检验要求。

召回产品	召回系统
批产品
召回系统能够召回任何一批已发运的产品。

消除原因	CAPA系统
已发现不符合项
CAPA系统的纠正措施应当消除已发现的不符合项的原因。

确保实现	质量目标
高层管理人员
高层管理人员应当确保实现质量目标。

定期进行	企业
自检
企业应当定期进行自检。

法规依据	GMP
中国GMP(2010年修订版)
中国GMP(2010年修订版)是中国实施GMP的具体法规依据。

依据标准	质量保证体系
质量标准
质量保证体系确保药品按照质量标准进行生产和控制。

需要资源	质量目标
资源
实现质量目标需要必需的资源。

降低风险	产品发运
质量风险
产品的发运能够最大限度地降低质量风险。

消除原因	CAPA系统
潜在不符合项
CAPA系统的预防措施应当消除潜在不符合项的原因。

依据规程	工艺规程
质量保证体系
质量保证体系确保药品按照批准的工艺规程进行生产和控制。

消除原因	CAPA系统
不符合项
CAPA系统的纠正措施消除已发现不符合项的原因，预防措施消除潜在不符合项的原因。

control,management	Document
Document Management System
The Document Management System is established to manage the entire lifecycle of documents, including their drafting, revision, and approval.

encompass,include	Batch Production Record
Document
Documents, as a broad category, encompass specific types such as the Batch Production Record.

determine,retention period	Drug
Shelf Life
The Shelf Life of a Drug determines the minimum retention period for its batch records.

encompass,include	Batch Inspection Record
Document
Documents, as a broad category, encompass specific types such as the Batch Inspection Record.

create,fill out	Batch Production Record
Production Department
The Production Department is responsible for filling out the Batch Production Record.

access control,authorization	Authorized Personnel
Electronic Record
Only Authorized Personnel are permitted to enter or modify data within Electronic Records.

oversight,review	Batch Inspection Record
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department is responsible for reviewing the Batch Inspection Record.

foundation,fundamental element	Document
Quality Assurance System
Documents are described as a fundamental element of the Quality Assurance System.

contain,manage	Data
Electronic Record
Electronic Records are a medium for containing and managing Data, which must adhere to specific integrity and traceability rules.

oversight,review	Batch Production Record
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department is responsible for reviewing the Batch Production Record.

accompany,require	Batch Inspection Record
Drug
Each batch of Drug must have an accompanying Batch Inspection Record.

encompass,include	Document
Production Formula
Documents, as a category, encompass production formulas among other content types.

accompany,require	Batch Production Record
Drug
Each batch of Drug must have an accompanying Batch Production Record.

encompass,include	Document
Process Procedure
Documents, as a category, encompass process procedures among other content types.

based on,derived from	Batch Production Record
Production Formula
The Batch Production Record must be created based on the approved current production formula.

based on,derived from	Batch Production Record
Process Procedure
The Batch Production Record must be created based on the approved current process procedure.

contain,record	Batch Production Record
Key Process Parameters
The Batch Production Record must contain actual records of key process parameters.

contain,record	Batch Production Record
Material Balance Calculation
The Batch Production Record must contain material balance calculations.

contain,record	Batch Production Record
Deviation Investigation Record
The Batch Production Record must contain deviation explanations and investigation records.

organizational independence	Production Department
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department must be independent from the Production Department to ensure unbiased quality oversight.

functional responsibility	Quality Control
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department is the primary organizational unit responsible for executing quality control activities.

regulatory requirement	China GMP (2010 Revision)
Quality Control Department
China GMP (2010 Revision) defines the independence and responsibilities of the Quality Control Department.

complementary functions	Quality Assurance
Quality Control
Quality Control and Quality Assurance are complementary concepts covered together in Chapter 10 of China GMP, with quality control being a component of the broader quality assurance system.

regulatory requirement	China GMP (2010 Revision)
Deviation Handling Procedure
China GMP (2010 Revision) specifies the required content of the Deviation Handling Procedure.

environmental monitoring	Clean Room
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department is responsible for monitoring microbial and particulate levels in Clean Rooms.

regulatory requirement	Change Control Procedure
China GMP (2010 Revision)
China GMP (2010 Revision) specifies the required content of the Change Control Procedure.

operational management	Quality Control Department
Quality Control Laboratory
The Quality Control Department is responsible for establishing management procedures for the Quality Control Laboratory.

regulatory requirement	CAPA Procedure
China GMP (2010 Revision)
China GMP (2010 Revision) specifies the required content of the Corrective and Preventive Actions Procedure.

regulatory compliance,standard development	Internal Control Standards
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department is responsible for establishing and revising internal control standards for raw materials, intermediates, and finished products.

regulatory requirement	China GMP (2010 Revision)
Complaint Handling Procedure
China GMP (2010 Revision) specifies the required content of the Complaint Handling Procedure.

corrective action,preventive action	CAPA Procedure
Deviation Handling Procedure
The Deviation Handling Procedure includes the development and implementation of corrective and preventive measures, which are also central to the CAPA Procedure.

procedure development,quality control	Quality Control Department
Sampling Procedures
The Quality Control Department is responsible for developing sampling procedures.

regulatory requirement	China GMP (2010 Revision)
Recall Procedure
China GMP (2010 Revision) specifies the required content of the Recall Procedure.

continuous improvement,follow-up	CAPA Procedure
Self-Inspection Procedure
The Self-Inspection Procedure includes tracking of corrective and preventive actions, linking it to the CAPA Procedure.

equipment management,laboratory operations	Quality Control Department
Testing Equipment
The Quality Control Department is responsible for establishing management procedures for testing equipment, instruments, reagents, and related materials.

regulatory requirement	China GMP (2010 Revision)
Self-Inspection Procedure
China GMP (2010 Revision) specifies the required content of the Self-Inspection Procedure.

investigation process,quality assessment	Deviation Handling Procedure
Deviation Investigation
The Deviation Handling Procedure includes deviation investigation as a core component involving description, root cause analysis, and impact assessment.

quality evaluation,sampling,testing	Quality Control Department
Raw Materials
The Quality Control Department performs sampling, testing, retention, and quality stability evaluation on raw materials.

cause identification,corrective action basis	CAPA Procedure
Root Cause Analysis
Root Cause Analysis is a required step in the CAPA Procedure to identify the fundamental cause before developing corrective and preventive measures.

corrective measures,preventive measures	Corrective And Preventive Actions
Deviation Handling Procedure
The Deviation Handling Procedure includes the development and implementation of corrective and preventive actions as part of the deviation resolution process.

quality evaluation,sampling,testing	Intermediates
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department performs sampling, testing, retention, and quality stability evaluation on intermediates.

cause identification,systematic analysis	Deviation Investigation
Root Cause Analysis
Root Cause Analysis is a key element of Deviation Investigation used to identify the fundamental cause of deviations.

effectiveness verification,systematic implementation	CAPA Procedure
Corrective And Preventive Actions
The CAPA Procedure governs the systematic development, implementation, and effectiveness verification of corrective and preventive actions.

quality evaluation,sampling,testing	Finished Products
Quality Control Department
The Quality Control Department performs sampling, testing, retention, and quality stability evaluation on finished products and issues testing reports.

documentation,quality verification	Quality Control Department
Testing Reports
The Quality Control Department issues testing reports after performing sampling, testing, and retention activities.

framework description,guideline	ICH Q10
Pharmaceutical Quality System
ICH Q10 is the guideline that describes the Pharmaceutical Quality System (PQS).

accountability,governance	Pharmaceutical Quality System
Senior Management
Senior Management holds ultimate responsibility for the Pharmaceutical Quality System, including establishing quality objectives, ensuring resources, and organizational structure.

foundational reference,guideline basis	ICH Q10
ICH Q8
ICH Q10 is based on and references ICH Q8 (pharmaceutical development) as one of its foundational guidelines.

regulatory compliance,requirement inclusion	GMP
Pharmaceutical Quality System
The Pharmaceutical Quality System must contain GMP requirements as a core component.

foundational reference,guideline basis	ICH Q10
ICH Q9
ICH Q10 is based on and references ICH Q9 (quality risk management) as one of its foundational guidelines.

integration,risk-based approach	Pharmaceutical Quality System
Quality Risk Management
The Pharmaceutical Quality System integrates quality risk management as a key element.

knowledge utilization,process improvement	Knowledge Management
Pharmaceutical Quality System
The Pharmaceutical Quality System promotes knowledge management to improve processes and products.

ongoing enhancement,quality culture	Continuous Improvement
Pharmaceutical Quality System
The Pharmaceutical Quality System achieves and supports continuous improvement as a fundamental goal.

establishment,governance	Quality Objectives
Senior Management
Senior Management is responsible for establishing clear quality objectives as part of their duties for the Pharmaceutical Quality System.

data.tgt_id: Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring
data.content:
monitoring,quality assurance	Pharmaceutical Quality System
Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring
Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring is a key element of the Pharmaceutical Quality System for tracking and evaluating manufacturing performance.

corrective action,deviation management	CAPA
Pharmaceutical Quality System
CAPA is a key element of the Pharmaceutical Quality System for addressing deviations and preventing their recurrence.

knowledge application,quality improvement	Knowledge Management
Product Quality
Knowledge Management uses collected and analyzed data to improve pharmaceutical processes and ultimately product quality.

change control,quality impact assessment	Change Management
Pharmaceutical Quality System
Change Management is a key element of the Pharmaceutical Quality System for evaluating and controlling changes that may affect product quality.

information sharing,system integration	CAPA
Knowledge Management
The CAPA system should be combined with the knowledge management system to share findings and prevent recurrence of issues.

data.tgt_id: Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring
data.content:
performance tracking,periodic assessment	Process Performance Evaluation
Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring
Process Performance Evaluation is conducted periodically as part of the Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring system.

effectiveness evaluation,system review	Periodic Review of PQS
Pharmaceutical Quality System
The Periodic Review evaluates the effectiveness of the Pharmaceutical Quality System, covering process performance, product quality, and CAPA.

impact assessment,quality protection	Change Management
Product Quality
The Change Management system evaluates the impact of changes on product quality to ensure quality is maintained.

deviation analysis,investigation method	CAPA
Root Cause Investigation
The CAPA system uses root cause investigation methods to determine the underlying causes of deviations and quality issues.

data.src_id: Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring
data.content:
periodic review,quality assessment	Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring
Product Quality Review
Product Quality Review is implemented as part of the Process Performance and Product Quality Monitoring system.

data-driven improvement,feedback loop	Continuous Improvement
Periodic Review of PQS
The results of the Periodic Review of PQS are used to drive continuous improvement within the pharmaceutical quality system.

guideline definition,regulatory framework	ICH Q9
Quality Risk Management
ICH Q9 is the guideline that defines and describes the quality risk management process for pharmaceutical products.

sequential step,subprocess	Risk Assessment
Risk Identification
Risk identification is the first step within the risk assessment process.

mitigation action,subprocess	Risk Control
Risk Reduction
Risk reduction is a component of risk control involving measures to lower risk levels.

sequential step,subprocess	Risk Analysis
Risk Assessment
Risk analysis is the second step within the risk assessment process, estimating identified risks.

decision making,subprocess	Risk Acceptance
Risk Control
Risk acceptance is a component of risk control involving the decision to accept residual risk.

sequential step,subprocess	Risk Assessment
Risk Evaluation
Risk evaluation is the third step within the risk assessment process, comparing risks against criteria.

data flow,sequential dependency	Risk Analysis
Risk Identification
Risk analysis estimates the risks that have been identified through risk identification.

process component,systematic framework	Quality Risk Management
Risk Assessment
Risk assessment is a core component of the quality risk management process.

process component,systematic framework	Quality Risk Management
Risk Control
Risk control is a core component of the quality risk management process.

process component,systematic framework	Quality Risk Management
Risk Review
Risk review is a core component of the quality risk management process.

analytical method,tool application	FMEA
Quality Risk Management
FMEA is one of the commonly used tools within the quality risk management framework.

analytical method,tool application	FTA
Quality Risk Management
FTA is one of the commonly used tools within the quality risk management framework.

analytical method,tool application	HACCP
Quality Risk Management
HACCP is one of the commonly used tools within the quality risk management framework.

analytical method,tool application	HAZOP
Quality Risk Management
HAZOP is one of the commonly used tools within the quality risk management framework.

analytical method,tool application	PHA
Quality Risk Management
PHA is one of the commonly used tools within the quality risk management framework.

analytical method,tool application	Quality Risk Management
Risk Ranking And Filtering
Risk ranking and filtering is one of the commonly used tools within the quality risk management framework.

application,process management	Production Process Control
Quality Risk Management
Quality risk management can be applied to production process control to manage risks in pharmaceutical manufacturing.

application,change evaluation	Change Management
Quality Risk Management
Quality risk management can be applied to change management to evaluate and control risks associated with process or system changes.

application,deviation assessment	Deviation Handling
Quality Risk Management
Quality risk management can be applied to deviation handling to assess and manage risks arising from process deviations.

application,supply chain risk	Quality Risk Management
Supplier Management
Quality risk management can be applied to supplier management to evaluate and control risks related to suppliers.

application,design risk mitigation	Facility And Equipment Design
Quality Risk Management
Quality risk management can be applied to facility and equipment design to identify and mitigate design-related risks.

application,quality assurance	Quality Risk Management
Validation And Confirmation
Quality risk management can be applied to validation and confirmation to ensure processes and systems meet quality requirements.

application,documentation control	Document Management
Quality Risk Management
Quality risk management can be applied to document management to manage risks associated with pharmaceutical documentation.
